name: Double Chocolate Grand Marnier Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt the semisweet chocolate and unsweetened chocolate together in a microwave or double boiler.
3. Add sugar, eggs, and butter to melted chocolate; mix well.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, and vanilla.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the chocolate mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Pour batter into an 8 x 8 greased pan.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until set.
8. Allow brownies to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
9. Immediately after baking, brush with Grand Marnier and allow to dry completely.
10. In a separate bowl, melt chocolate and butter together. Stir in cream and remaining Grand Marnier; add icing sugar. Mix until smooth.
11. Spread icing over cooled brownies.
12. Allow the entire mixture to sit for at least 24 hours before cutting and serving.
